finding: A `broker-conflict-blocked` claim recommends `team broker resolve`, but the command-produced `atm.brokerConflictResolution.v1` shape does not prove it carries the canonical broker ticket, authority generation/digest, authorization grants, and bounded resource keys required by claim admission. The advertised recovery can therefore produce a sidecar that the retry still rejects.
expectedBehavior: The official resolution producer and claim consumer must share one authority-envelope contract. Running the exact command returned by the freeze should either admit the authorized task pair/resource on retry or fail before writing an unusable artifact with a precise missing-authority diagnosis.
evidenceOrRepro: Plan 3.1 dogfood on 2026-07-22: `ATM-GOV-0239` claim by `claude-plan31-captain` froze against active `ATM-GOV-0249` at logical resource `atom-core-registry` with `sharedPaths: []`. Source audit found `createBrokerConflictResolutionArtifact` and the legacy resolve command do not visibly populate the authority fields checked by `readResolutionAuthorizedForeignTaskIds`, despite the freeze recommending that command.
followUp: Implement and close ATM-GOV-0255. Add a command-to-retry regression covering the exact no-shared-path logical overlap, preserve fail-closed behavior for stale or over-broad grants, and link the resulting frozen-runner proof back to this item.
